_case: Perth Seawater Desalination Plant (Stage 1) — Cockburn Sound submerged brine diffuser
_provenance: WA EPA App-D 'Perth Desalination Plant Discharge Modelling: Model Validation'; ~45 GL/yr, 45% recovery; ~163 m double-tee diffuser, 40 ports x 0.13 m at 60 deg; total ~2.51 m3/s; ambient 36.5 psu; discharge 61.4 psu; design target 45:1 dilution at 50 m; mixing-zone limits dS<1.2 ppt @50 m, <0.8 ppt @1000 m.
